# Development Statistics

Historical codebase metrics for Nobodies Humans, tracked per day from the initial commit.

**Excludes from app-code columns:** EF Core migration files (auto-generated, distorts line counts). Migration weight is tracked separately in the `Migration Lines` column so its growth stays visible.
**Test code** is separated from app code in its own columns.
**Markdown** is tracked across the whole repo (docs, skills, root files) in `MD Lines`.

Generated by `bash docs/scripts/generate-stats.sh` (incremental — appends new days).
To rebuild every row from scratch (e.g. after a schema change):
`bash docs/scripts/generate-stats.sh --full`.

## Quick Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|------:|
| Latest snapshot | 2026-05-15 |
| App + Test lines | 288,420 |
| App / Test lines | 204,942 / 83,478 |
| C# code (no blanks/comments) | 104,966 |
| C# comments | 23,481 |
| Markdown lines | 154,117 |
| Migration lines | 363,241 |
| Files (app + test) | 1,898 |
| Commits | 1,341 |
| Test ratio | 28.9% |
| 7-day delta | +58,229 app+test lines from 2026-05-09 to 2026-05-15 |
| 7-day average | +9,705 lines/day over the same span |

## Language Breakdown

Latest app-code mix at the 2026-05-15 snapshot:

| Language | Lines | Share of App Lines | Files |
|----------|------:|-------------------:|------:|
| C# | 148,019 | 72.2% | 1,188 |
| Razor (`.cshtml`) | 40,226 | 19.6% | 318 |
| RESX | 13,308 | 6.5% | 6 |
| JavaScript | 3,389 | 1.7% | 27 |

Tracked separately (not part of `App Lines`):

| Category | Lines | Files | Notes |
|----------|------:|------:|-------|
| Markdown | 154,117 | 463 | Whole repo (docs, skills, root). Now exceeds raw C# total. |
| EF Migrations | 363,241 | 191 | Auto-generated. ~1.8× the entire app source — overdue for consolidation. |
| C# comments | 23,481 | — | Subset of `CS Lines`. ~15.9% of C# is comments. |

## Highlights

- **First commit:** 2026-02-04 (7.1k lines)
- **Current:** 288k app+test lines across 1,898 files in 90 days with commits
- **Growth rate:** ~3,205 lines/day average
- **Biggest day:** 2026-05-15 (+30,845 lines) — new all-time high
- **Busiest churn day:** 2026-04-22 (+29,432 / -10,883) — combined +/- still tops the list
- **Test ratio:** 28.9% of codebase (83k test lines / 288k total) — climbing fast (was 21.5% on 04-26)
- **Localization:** 1,788 resx keys (5 languages = ~8,940 translated strings)
- **Architecture:** 1,750 classes, 180 interfaces, 76 controllers, 318 views, 92 entities
- **Documentation weight:** 154k markdown lines — now exceeds the 148k of raw C# and dwarfs the 105k of C# code-only
- **Migration debt:** 363k lines across 191 migration files — ~1.8× the entire app source, overdue for consolidation

## Column Key

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| App Lines | Lines of code in `src/` excluding migrations and tests (`.cs`, `.cshtml`, `.resx`, `.js`) |
| CS / CSHTML / RESX / JS Lines | App-code lines split by language family, using the same exclusions as `App Lines`. Raw line counts including blanks and comments. |
| CS Code | Semantic C# code lines (excludes blanks and comments). Sourced from `cloc`. Same scope as `CS Lines`. |
| CS Comment | C# comment lines (single-line `//`/`///`, block `/* */`, doc-comments). Sourced from `cloc`. Same scope as `CS Lines`. Blank lines = `CS Lines − CS Code − CS Comment`. |
| MD Lines | Markdown lines across the whole repo (docs, skills, root files). Excludes `.git/`, `node_modules/`, `bin/`, `obj/`, and any sibling worktrees. |
| Migration Lines | Raw line count of `src/**/Migrations/**/*.cs`. Tracked separately so the cost of accumulated EF migrations is visible. |
| Test Lines | Lines of code in test projects (`.cs` only) |
| App KB / Test KB | File size in kilobytes (1024 bytes), rounded |
| Files | Total source files (app + test, excluding migrations) |
| Classes | `public/internal class` + `record` declarations in app code |
| Interfaces | `public interface` declarations in app code |
| Controllers | `*Controller.cs` files |
| Views | `.cshtml` files |
| Entities | `.cs` files under `*/Entities/` directories |
| Resx Keys | Localization string count in `SharedResource.resx` |
| Commits | Cumulative commit count |
| Day +/- Lines | Lines added/removed that day (excluding migrations) |
